description: Letter in Hebrew. May be addressed to Yosef b. David (per the address on verso) or to the Damascene cantor Seʿadya b. Mevorakh (per what is written above the letter on recto). What remains of the letter consists entirely of poetical phrases. There is another text block on verso which seems to deal with halakhic issues.
description_he: מכתב בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
